summary: Tested MetalMindTech landing page backend (8 pytest tests, all passed) and frontend (desktop + mobile flows, all passed). POST/GET /api/leads work correctly with email validation, _id excluded, default source='audit', recent-first ordering, and limit param. Frontend renders Navigation, Hero ($997 + Undeniable Outcome), AuditOffer ($997), Guarantee (72-Hour Revenue Recovery), FAQ accordion, Footer. All Forge links point to https://ark.metalmindtech.com with target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer. Hero CTA opens lead form dialog, submission persists and shows success state. FAQ accordion expand/collapse works. Mobile nav drawer toggles, contains mobile-forge-nav-link and mobile-nav-cta-book-audit which opens dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside create_lead (line 95) but only configured later in the file (line 127). It works because handlers run after module import, but for clarity move logging.basicConfig + logger = ... above the route definitions.

server.py: create_lead wraps Pydantic-validated work in a broad try/except returning 500. Pydantic validation errors are raised before the handler body, so 422 still surfaces correctly, but consider logging the request id / payload (sans PII) for traceability.

Footer.jsx: external links use target=_blank with rel=noopener noreferrer (good). Internal hash links lack scroll-margin handling — fine for now since Tailwind scroll-mt is set in sections, but verify on all anchors.
LeadFormDialog: phone/notes are length-capped server-side (notes max 2000) but client does not show counter — minor UX nicety.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created test leads with TEST_ prefix in name/company via API for persistence verification (8 leads across runs). No cleanup endpoint exists; safe to leave or drop the `leads` collection in test_database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_metalmind_api.py and use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. The app is a single-route SPA (/). FORGE_URL = https://ark.metalmindtech.com is intentional — the subdomain is not yet provisioned but links must point there. Lead form opens via context (LeadFormProvider) from Hero/Nav/AuditOffer/FinalCTA/Mobile CTAs with source values audit|contact|forge.
